narrative:
Precinct Buckskin South Salem (precinct in Ross County) has 656 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 6.1 percentage points.
